liquor_licenses.board_action: Presented at Full Board Meeting on June 13, 2023. The SLA Review & DCA Committee recommendation will be voted at the Full Board Meeting on September 12, 2023.

votes.motion_text: Approval of the agenda as written
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Joel Gross made a motion to approve the agenda as written. The motion was seconded by Ms. Julia Foster the motion was carried unanimously.

votes.motion_text: Approval of the minutes of May 16, 2023
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Joel Gross made a motion to approve the minutes of May 16, 2023, the motion was seconded by Mr. Philip Caponegro. Motion carried.

votes.motion_text: Approval of the minutes for the Special Full Board Meeting, May 16, 2023
votes.source_snippet: Mr. Gross made a motion to approve the minutes for the Special Full Board Meeting, May 16, 2023, the motion was seconded by Ms. Julia Foster.

votes.motion_text: Approval of the SLA Review & DCA Committee Report as written
votes.source_snippet: The vote was as follows: 29 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS" The Motion carried.

votes.motion_text: Send a letter to the mayor's office and Elected Officials to Delay the process of Local Law 31 B and 59A
votes.source_snippet: The vote was as follows: 18 "YES"; 7 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS" The Motion carried.

votes.motion_text: Approve the proposals, except number 4, which deals with energy storage systems on buildings. That provision should be denied until the FDNY establishes protocols for extinguishing fires caused by building-scale energy storage systems (ESS).
conditions: Provision #4 regarding energy storage systems on residential rooftops should be denied until FDNY establishes protocols for extinguishing fires caused by building-scale energy storage systems
votes.source_snippet: The vote was as follows: 28 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTIONS" The Motion carried.

votes.motion_text: Approve the Two Trees application to the Public Design Commission for two design treatments of the Refinery
votes.source_snippet: The vote was as follows: 29 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 1 "ABSTENTIONS" The Motion carried.

votes.motion_text: Approve the Department of City Planning request for 497 Grand Street to be certified as a fresh food store
votes.source_snippet: The vote was as follows: 29 "YES"; 0 "NO"; 0 "ABSTENTIONS" The Motion carried.

public_speakers.name: Sallie Gonzalez
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Sallie Gonzalez- concerned with Mr. Brice Jones stating that the committee did not want to speak with him, she stated it was very indigenous. She was very concerned about the added noise this establishment would bring. Ms. Gonzalez spoke to oppose a liquor license at 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Evelyn Cruz
public_speakers.topic: business affecting community residents' quality of life
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Evelyn Cruz from Congressmember Velasquez – Spoke about not supporting a business that will affect the community residents. She added that although she supports small business it should not affect the resident's quality of life.

public_speakers.name: Joel Gross
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Joel Gross stated on the record that they have support from several Elected officials opposing the Liquor License for 240 Broadway. Mr. Gross opposed a liquor license for 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Delecia Jenkins
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Delecia Jenkins spoke to oppose a liquor license at 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Wise
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mrs. Wise spoke to oppose a liquor license at 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Joel Lovinger
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Joel Lovinger spoke to oppose a liquor license at 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Abraham Frankel
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Abraham Frankel spoke to oppose a liquor license at 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Alex Fireb
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Alex Fireb spoke to oppose a liquor license at 240 Broadway.

public_speakers.name: Lauren Comito
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Lauren Comito spoke regarding the updates for Leonard Library.

public_speakers.name: Kevin LaCherra
public_speakers.source_snippet: Mr. Kevin LaCherra spoke on the McGuinness Boulevard safety redesign plan.

public_speakers.name: Ryan Kuonen
public_speakers.topic: Lack of outreach by the Outreach Committee and need for an email list
public_speakers.source_snippet: Ms. Ryan Kuonen commented about a lack of outreach by the Outreach Committee and the need for an email list that announces Community Board #1 meetings.

cannabis_licenses.source_snippet: PRESENTATION- 185 BEDFORD AVENUE, STORE FRONT-  EDGAR Klyedman and Giorgio Matesi of dba RMAN Holdings, LLC DBA High of Brooklyn Dispensary have obtained a provisional license from the Cannabis Control Board and intend to file an application for full license with the NYS Office of Cannabis Management to open Retail Dispensary, on -site consumption business.
